title: Breakout
description: You are inside a privileged Docker container. Break out to the host filesystem and capture the root flag.
longDescription:
You start with a shell inside a Docker container running with elevated privileges. The challenge demonstrates how insecure container configurations — --privileged, exposed Docker socket, dangerous capabilities — can lead to full host compromise.

Chain together the misconfigurations to escape the container boundary, pivot to the host, and read the flag from the host's root directory.

### What you will practice
Container escape via privileged mode, Docker socket exploitation with nsenter, and understanding the Linux capability model.
creator: Dock & Root Labs
objectives: Mount the host filesystem from inside the container
Escape the container namespace using nsenter
